title: Ending of Evangelion 222 and Gamera 3
wikitext: []: Ending of Evangelion 2.22 and Gamera 3             Quote Post by Gyaosu » Tue Aug 07, 2018 11:27 am Hi, as you know, the Heisei Gamera trilogy is heavily influencend by NGE because of Shinji Higuchi's involvement. Has anyone noticed the similarities between the endings of Evangelion 2.22 and Gamera 3 too? - Both Rei Ayanami and Ayana Hirasaka are absorbed by an angel/angel-like kaiju (Iris) that has tentacles. - Both Eva-01 and Gamera lose one of their arms and replace it by a "fire" before rescuing the absorbed girl which results in the destruction of the angel/kaiju. Do you think that the ending of Evangelion 2.22 is a direct reference to Gamera 3?

chunks.content:
Article: Ending of Evangelion 222 and Gamera 3
[]: Ending of Evangelion 2.22 and Gamera 3             Quote Post by Gyaosu » Tue Aug 07, 2018 11:27 am Hi, as you know, the Heisei Gamera trilogy is heavily influencend by NGE because of Shinji Higuchi's involvement. Has anyone noticed the similarities between the endings of Evangelion 2.22 and Gamera 3 too? - Both Rei Ayanami and Ayana Hirasaka are absorbed by an angel/angel-like kaiju (Iris) that has tentacles. - Both Eva-01 and Gamera lose one of their arms and replace it by a "fire" before rescuing the absorbed girl which results in the destruction of the angel/kaiju. Do you think that the ending of Evangelion 2.22 is a direct reference to Gamera 3?
